required_operator_inputs: restore explaino_all to the pre-4fc5aed seven-axis shared-carrier product contract while preserving the later explicit selector identity repair
keep the seven legacy Explaino axis controls visible on both explaino_all and their explicit owner lanes
preserve the bounded smooth_escape tier_auto usability/perf fix on the repaired explaino_all lane as well as the explicit owner lanes
keep deferred non-axis Explaino surfaces outside canonical explaino_all ownership unless separate historical proof says otherwise
close only with focused native proof, runtime publish, published-runtime proof, hostile audit, checkpoint commit, receipts, push, clean tree, and stale-plan cleanup
forbidden_operator_prompts: leave explaino_all as a neutral umbrella that ignores the seven legacy shared axes
hide the seven legacy axis controls from explaino_all while claiming the shared carrier is restored
rebreak explicit Explaino selector identity while restoring explaino_all shared-carrier behavior
pull deferred dual-seed, cluster-radius, phoenix-step, or coupling surfaces into canonical explaino_all ownership without separate proof
rebreak the smooth_escape tier_auto fast path while restoring explaino_all shared-carrier behavior
widen this slice into Meta-Basin, Operator-Itinerary, DSL/program-space, generic color expansion, renderer replacement, or a broad engine rewrite
close without commit, machine receipts, hostile-audit proof, runtime publish, published-runtime proof, push, and a clean tree

required_acceptance_assertions.description: The Explaino-all legacy shared-carrier repair contract validates successfully
The Explaino-all legacy shared-carrier phased plan stays synchronized
The Explaino-all legacy shared-carrier hostile-audit validator passes
